name: Aggressive Threat Response (Zero Tolerance)
description: Fast escalation for high-security environments. First offence gets a warning, second gets blocked, and persistent attackers are immediately pushed to the firewall. Use when protecting sensitive systems.
author: Ghostwire Proxy

thresholds.name: Immediate warning
thresholds.notes: First detected threat event triggers a warning.

thresholds.name: Fast permanent block
thresholds.notes: 8 events in 1 hour or score 75 = permanent block.

thresholds.name: Rapid firewall escalation
thresholds.notes: 15 events in 6 hours or score 150 = pushed to firewall immediately.
